mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (farmer_id, consumer_id, unread_count, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{farmerId}, #{consumerId}, #{unreadCount}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.select: SELECT cs.*, f.farmer_name as farmerName FROM chat_session cs LEFT JOIN farmer f ON cs.farmer_id = f.id WHERE cs.consumer_id = #{consumerId} ORDER BY cs.last_message_time DESC
SELECT cs.*, cu.login_name as consumerName FROM chat_session cs LEFT JOIN consumer_user cu ON cs.consumer_id = cu.id WHERE cs.farmer_id = #{farmerId} ORDER BY cs.last_message_time DESC
